query:
-- Check what columns metas_financeiras has
SHOW COLUMNS FROM `metas_financeiras`;
stdout:
Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
id	int	NO	PRI	NULL	auto_increment
mes	int	NO		NULL	
ano	int	NO		NULL	
meta_mensal	decimal(12,2)	YES		200000.00	
dias_uteis	int	YES		22	
dias_trabalhados	int	YES		0	
createdAt	timestamp	NO		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	
updatedAt	timestamp	NO		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP	DEFAULT_GENERATED on update CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
